name: Parakeet TDT 0.6b-v3 — Unbiased on Gold-92
short_description: Per-clip STT predictions from nvidia/parakeet-tdt-0.6b-v3 in standard inference mode (no keyword injection) on all 93 gold-92 benchmark clips.
model_description: nvidia/parakeet-tdt-0.6b-v3, Token-and-Duration Transducer, NeMo/Riva SDK, GPU inference, no vocabulary biasing

files.description: Per-clip STT predictions on all 93 gold-92 benchmark clips. Each line: clip_id, hypothesis, latency_seconds.
